nativeProps: NumberFieldProps with a documented fractional percentage scale

compositionPolicy.scale: The canonical value is always a fraction: 1 is 100%, 0.125 is 12.5%, and -0.2 is -20% when permitted by bounds.
compositionPolicy.value: JavaScript and hidden form values use the fraction; only the visible percentage is localized and scaled by Intl.
compositionPolicy.bounds: The 0-to-1 default range is a convenience and can be explicitly extended for growth, variance, or signed-rate domains.
